{#- Custom page.html template that bridges ABlog with Furo theme. This template extends Furo's page.html (using "!page.html" to get the theme's version) and adds the necessary ABlog context for blog posts. ABlog normally extends layout.html which Furo doesn't support, so we provide this bridge template instead. -#} {%- extends "!page.html" %} {# Add site-wide navigation bar #} {%- block body %}
BenchBox
Home Docs Blog GitHub
{{ super() }} {%- endblock body %} {# Add RSS/Atom feed link in head for blog pages #} {%- block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {% if feed_path %} {% endif %} {% endblock extrahead %} {# Extend content block to add blog post metadata and navigation #} {% block content %} {{ body }} {# Add post metadata (date, author, tags) below title for blog posts #} {# This is injected after body and repositioned via JavaScript #} {% if ablog is defined and pagename in ablog %} {% set post = ablog[pagename] %}
{% if post.published %} {{ post.date.strftime(ablog.post_date_format) }} {% else %} Draft{% if post.date %} - {{ post.date.strftime(ablog.post_date_format) }}{% endif %} {% endif %} {% if post.author %} · {% for author in post.author %} {{ author }}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% if post.tags %} · {% for tag in post.tags %} {{ tag }}{% if not loop.last %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Add post navigation for blog posts #} {% if ablog is defined and pagename in ablog and ablog.post_show_prev_next %}
{% if ablog[pagename].prev %}
← {{ ablog[pagename].prev.title }}
{% endif %} {% if ablog[pagename].next %}
{{ ablog[pagename].next.title }} →
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endblock content %}
